summary: Implemented text search for the browse page. Added `filterByText` pure function in `src/domain/filterCards.ts` that case-insensitively matches against card `prompt` and `guidance` fields, returning all cards for empty/whitespace queries. Created `SearchInput` component with accessible `type=\"search\"` input and `aria-label`. Integrated search into `BrowseAllCards` with `searchQuery` state, composing `filterByTier` and `filterByText` for the displayed list. Added a no-results message when search yields no matches. All 26 US-013 tests pass; lint and typecheck clean.
